modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to hear each other during Cisco VoIP phone calls.

full_description_text: Users are experiencing an issue where they cannot hear each other during calls made through Cisco VoIP phones. This problem occurs consistently when attempting to communicate, leading to a complete lack of audio. The situation has been reported during live chat sessions with the help desk.
short_description: Unable to hear each other during Cisco VoIP phone calls.
description: Users are experiencing an issue where they cannot hear each other during calls made through Cisco VoIP phones. This problem occurs consistently when attempting to communicate, leading to a complete lack of audio. The situation has been reported during live chat sessions with the help desk.
